title: Tuna Salad
description: Creamy, flavorful tuna salad made with mayo, Greek yogurt, and Dijon mustard. Perfect on bread or crackers.

steps.instruction: Drain tuna thoroughly. Place in a bowl and use a fork to break it into fine flakes.
Add mayonnaise, Greek yogurt, mustard, lemon juice, and all seasonings.
Mix vigorously until the tuna is well-coated and the mixture is cohesive and moist.
If the mixture feels dry, add an additional 1 tsp mayonnaise and mix again.
If using dill, mince extremely finely and fold in.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 24 hours.

notes: Full-fat mayonnaise keeps the mixture moist and cohesive. Greek yogurt adds extra protein and creaminess.
